title: Luna Universal Probe qPCR (NEB)
description: New England Biolabs probe-based 20 uL qPCR (M3004): 95 C activation, 40-45 cycles, no melt curve.

ingredients.name: Luna Universal Probe qPCR Master Mix

payload.notes: Probe-based (hydrolysis probe) chemistry, so there is no melt curve. Primers 0.4 uM (400 nM) each final from a 10 uM stock (optimize 200-900 nM); probe 0.2 uM (200 nM) final from a 10 uM stock (optimize 100-500 nM). Up to 100 ng template. 40 cycles for most targets; 45 for very low input. Read on the probe fluorophore channel (e.g. FAM). For 384-well plates use a 10 uL reaction (halve all volumes). Source: NEB Luna Universal Probe qPCR Master Mix manual (M3004), https://www.neb.com/en/-/media/nebus/files/manuals/manualm3004.pdf
